layouts.page_structure: Bento Grid Protocol (High Density Grid for Dashboards). Strict grid hierarchy, dense and compact spacing.
layouts.containers: Go for 'Grid Borders (The Technical Look)' - exposing the skeleton. Containers should have 1px solid borders border-slate-800, flat background bg-slate-900, no shadow. Max 4px border radius for a sharp, serious look.

components.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow. Hover: slight lift, border color darkens/lightens. Use Grid Borders to separate sections.
components.tables: Shadcn Table component. High density. Monospace fonts for numbers (population, altitude, score). Sticky header.
components.map: Interactive map taking prominent space. Dark themed map tiles (e.g., CartoDB Dark Matter or similar via react-leaflet). Communes highlighted using choropleth style based on BBD Score.
components.score_badge: Monospace typography, color-coded by score_scale, solid background with 10% opacity of the accent color + 1px border of the accent color.
components.kpi_widgets: Large numerical values in IBM Plex Mono. Subtle sparkline chart or progress bar below.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Used ONLY for sticky headers or floating overlays (modals). bg-black/60 with backdrop-blur-xl and 1px border-white/10.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise on the main background to prevent flat 'dead' space.

motion.transitions: Fast, precise, no bouncy animations. Use transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease. No 'transition: all'.
motion.hover: Explicit hover states on table rows (bg-slate-800/50), clickable cards (border-slate-600).

creative_libraries.name: react-leaflet
creative_libraries.purpose: Interactive map of Massif des Bauges. Requires 'leaflet' and 'react-leaflet'.
creative_libraries.instructions: Use CartoDB Dark Matter tiles (url: 'https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/dark_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png') for a sleek intelligence-engine look.

creative_libraries.name: recharts
creative_libraries.purpose: Data visualization for KPI sparklines and score breakdown radar/bar charts.

backgrounds.description: Dark moody French Alps texture. Use as a very low opacity (5%) background texture or login screen background if needed.

instructions_to_main_agent: You MUST use dark theme. Add text-slate-200 and bg-[#0B0F19] to the root body or main app container.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, do not add '.App { text-align: center; }'.
Use strict grid layouts (Grid Borders style) for the dashboard. Keep it dense and data-heavy.
Use 'react-leaflet' for the interactive map. The map should be a central element of the dashboard, colored by commune score.
For the Commune detail view (Fiche commune), include a section for 'Commentaire IA' styled distinctively (e.g., slight blue/emerald tint background with a sparkle icon) to justify the score.
Include KPIs: Nb communes analysées, Nb communes score > 70, Potentiel total estimé.
Do NOT use transparent backgrounds for dropdowns/selects. Always use solid dark background (bg-slate-900).
Install required fonts from Google Fonts: IBM Plex Sans and IBM Plex Mono.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure APCA/WCAG AA contrast for text over dark backgrounds. Avoid gray-on-gray.
accessibility.focus: Use explicit focus rings focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500 focus:outline-none.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use generic centered layouts or simplistic gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and subtle 1px borders.
Never apply universal transition: all. Use specific transition properties.
Use modern button styles relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
DO NOT use placeholder image URLs. Use the provided image_urls.
